overview: A premium devotional D2C landing page for ZenDecorum™ Hanuman ji — a 3D crystal ball lamp with laser-engraved Hanuman Ji, designed to convert Indian devotional shoppers with trust signals, testimonials, comparisons, and FAQs.
features: Video carousel with placeholder tiles and golden glow borders
What's Inside The Box checklist with spec strip
Auto-scrolling Hinglish testimonial cards with avatar initials
Exit-intent coupon popup with Rs 100 OFF
Sticky pulse CTA button with trust badges
Full brand theming: cream, warm brown, saffron, gold — Poppins font
